Theorem sucex 7789
Description: The successor of a set is a set. (Contributed by NM, 30-Aug-1993.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
sucex.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
Assertion
Ref Expression
sucex ⊢ suc 𝐴 ∈ V
Proof of Theorem sucex
StepHypRef Expression
1 sucex.1 . 2 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
2 sucexg 7788 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 ∈ V → suc 𝐴 ∈ V)
31, 2ax-mp 5 1 ⊢ suc 𝐴 ∈ V
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   ∈ wcel 2142  Vcvv 3454  suc csuc 6348
